steps.title: Assess & Plan
steps.description: Review what changed in interviews since you last prepared. Follow the 12-week roadmap tailored for senior engineers returning to the game.

steps.title: Study & Practice
steps.description: Work through curated courses, coding platforms, and behavioral frameworks. Track every item you complete along the way.

steps.title: Mock & Ship
steps.description: Run mock interviews, practice AI-aware scenarios, and refine your stories. Walk into interviews with confidence and a proven system.
